**Описание:**
34-летнего безработного хикикомори после смерти его родителей выгнали из дома. Всеми отвергнутый и без гроша в кармане, он понимает, что зашёл в тупик и его жизнь могла быть намного лучше, сделай он другой выбор в прошлом. Как раз во время этих размышлений он видит грузовик, несущийся на трёх школьников. Герой бросается спасти подростков, однако сам погибает под колёсами... И перерождается в мире меча и магии в теле младенца по имени Рудеус Грейрат. Теперь он начнёт жизнь с чистого листа и без сожалений.

[AniDB](https://anidb.net/perl-bin/animedb.pl?show=anime&aid=16588)

Encoding is first and foremost a hobby for me. The public distribution of my encodes is always secondary in importance, and not even necessarily always mandatory. Take note that sometimes there could be many encodes uploaded at once, or at other times no encodes for a long while. Requests will probably not be read but you are free to make a comment. All uploads are sourced from the JPBD unless otherwise mentioned in the torrent title. Seeding may be fast at times or slow at other times. Torrent activity dies down as time passes and seeders disappear. If you arrive late to download, leave it open in your torrent client for a few days before asking for a seed from others. Also, please be kind and seed the torrent to others when you are finished downloading. If you have more questions visit the [discord server](https://discord.gg/usjW27V), where you can request reseeds of old torrents (read the pinned message with rules or your request may be deleted). You can also ask there about subtitles for these raw files (read the pinned message and attempt to use those resources yourself first before asking for help).

### Screenshots:
To view the images larger, middle click or right click and select "Open link in new tab." When I create BD vs MKV comparisons they will be displayed below. If you have more questions visit the [discord server](https://discord.gg/usjW27V), where you can request reseeds of old torrents (read the pinned message with rules or your request may be deleted). You can also ask there about subtitles for these raw files (read the pinned message and attempt to use those resources yourself first before asking for help).

### Screenshots:
To view the images larger, middle click or right click and select "Open link in new tab." When I create BD vs MKV comparisons they will be displayed below. Otherwise, screenshots generated by others are from a default clean copy of [mpv.net](https://github.com/mpvnet-player/mpv.net) with **screenshot-format=png** turned on, ran through [OptiPNG](https://optipng.sourceforge.net/) lossless size optimization, then uploaded to google photos host without compression.

The .md5 file is a hash file, it is used to determine that there is no corruption in the files you download from the torrent. [Here is a direct link](https://drive.google.com/uc?authuser=0&id=1d6cgbtZyuY0MAlVUaRlWnuZFrAQx4h6l&export=download) to BreezeHash, a software created by a friend that can calculate the hashes of files as well as check the integrity of files using a hash file such as .md5

| Type     | Manhwa                                                      |
| Year     | 2021                                                        |
| Chapters | 1-55                                                        |
**Synopsis**:
Have you ever wished you were special? Se-gye Lee certainly doesn’t! She wants nothing more than to be ordinary, but her extraordinary strength keeps landing her in hot water, like the time she accidentally knocked down the wall separating her home from her neighbor’s. Her good-looking neighbor, Juwon, is surprisingly nice about it, but he has secrets of his own. Then Yeong, who granted Se-gye her powers, comes back into her life. Se-gye asks him to make her normal again, but why does it seem like her life’s about to become much less ordinary?

title: J-Novel Club Prepub - Live to 2024-06-14
description:
![JNC Prepub Torrent](https://i.postimg.cc/vmY4WM3p/1711160345-24-203-201-116.png "JNC Prepub Torrent")

#### Your weekly Fantasy Isekai release from JNC has landed, glory to the saint of Ehrenfest ! May the princess escape Guillotine-sama.

Torrent by Prepub-Anon, espect our weekly release batch every weekend. I publish only the LN Prepub. For any Manga, find a way to rip it and we would include it. I won't be doing Nina either unless it expension in the near future's worth it.

[DDL 1ficher](https://1fichier.com/?vvomfk8yv9iwkdsnvda8 "DDL 1fichier")

Hello everynyaa, welcome to your weekly prepub upload... I almost was unable to make it this weekend... I could not catch a break at all. Hope you guys will enjoy it. JNC Staff have officially announced they will be at AX, schedule had been made too and posted for every publisher going there, most will be stream live. Japan Expo in France will also happen for the Nina lineup if you were interested into the Nina German or French lineup. Otherwise, hopefully I will be more free next weekend to be able to properly upload in time... Last week, I was able to free myself earlier on the meeting trip due to negociation going so smooth... they had already done the document signature electronically by the time I was there, including the whole contract negociation over Zoom... the boss was like "Sorry, I was too sick to call you, I had a very high fever for the last 3 days... But the new employe took the initiative to do it remotely... I think we might propose that for the future contract before sending you accross the country..." Thank boss... At least I got a raise and a bonus... Yeah ! That fool purchased some red lobster overstock... No wonder... Have a great week guys and remember, Red Lobster's the best laxative for a fever dream. 

Prepub-anon

title: [Mondo] Astroganger Discotek SDBD Backup
description:
This is a backup of Discotek's out of print SDBD of studio Knack's 1972 anime, Astroganger

Name: Astroganger
Episodes: 26
Total Runtime: 624 Minutes (10h24m)
Video: 1:33:1 4:3/ 480p SD
Audio: Dolby Digital 2.0 (Dual Mono)
Audio Language: Japanese
Subtitles: yes
Subtitle Language: English

Discotek's plot synopsis: 

IT'S ASTROGANGER-RIFFIC!!

A scourge is sweeping across the galaxy --a scourge called the Blasters! These devious and handily numbered alien invaders conquer, devour, and destroy every civilized world they see-- and now, their sights are set on Earth! But worry not, good children, because Earth has a top-secret countermeasure developed by Dr. Hoshi and his wife, the alluring alien Maya. Our secret weapon is the mighty, towering super robot, Astroganger! Crafted from mysterious alien living metal, the robot Ganger has just one weakness -- he's kinda dumb! Enter the best person for the job, Dr. Hoshi's ten-year-old son Kantaro.

By joining their powers together, Ganger and Kantaro fuse the incredible power of a fightin', flyin' robot with the uncompromisingly savage, decisive intelligence of an intrepid youngster: Astroganger! With their powers combined, they'll save the world approximately twenty-six times!
(THIS SET CONTAINS "26 EPISODES" IN THE ORIGINAL "JAPANESE LANGUAGE" WITH "ENGLISH SUBTITLES.") [the quotes are there because those words are in a different text color]

title: [Arcedo & Asayao] BLUE ARCHIVE The Animation - 10 VOSTFR (Web-Rip H.264 1080p AAC).mkv
description:
**SAISONNIER PRINTEMPS 2024** : en VOSTFR tous les dimanches à 16h45 chez Team Arcedo et sur Yuzuki TV.

Lyrics OP & ED dispo sur cet épisode.
**À savoir :** notre version comporte des signs réalisés avec les outils d'édition du logiciel Aegisub, et contient aussi les lyrics pour l'OP et ED.
Loli power & bon visionnage !

- **Synopsis de l'anime** :
> *L'histoire se déroule dans une cité universitaire où chaque secteur est considéré comme indépendant. En temps ordinaire, c'est le Conseil Étudiant qui assure la coordination entre les secteurs et leur bonne entente. Le problème, c'est que la présidente du Conseil a disparu...
Au sein de l’immense cité académique de Kivotos, fondée suite à l’union de milliers d’écoles, les affrontements armés entre élèves sont devenus monnaie courante. Tandis que la situation semble déjà intenable, le lycée Abydos s’apprête à fermer ses portes en raison d’un important endettement, résultant au transfert de ses occupants vers d’autres écoles.
Entourés de sable, les environs de l’établissement se sont grandement détériorés avec le temps, au même titre que son prestige d’antan. Toutefois, cinq étudiantes issues de cette école refusent d’accepter la situation et décident de se battre pour rembourser la dette et ainsi éviter la fermeture définitive.
Cependant, cette lourde tâche n’a rien de simple, car en plus des gangs locaux qui cherchent à porter le coup fatal au lycée, plusieurs lourds secrets du passé ressurgissent les uns après les autres…*

***

**Date a Live V | デート・ア・ライブV | Рандеву с Жизнью [ТВ-5]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** приключения
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 10 из 24
**Дата выпуска:** c 10.04.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Geek Toys](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=862)
**Снято по ранобэ:** [Рандеву с жизнью](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=2870)
**Автор оригинала:** [Татибана Коси](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=579531)
**Режиссер:** [Накагава Ацуси](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=560986)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11380), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=25912), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/17476), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/52196)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniBaza](https://t.me/Ani_Baza)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [SHIZA Project](https://shiza-project.com)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские, Multi-8 (софтсаб) | Crunchyroll 

**Описание:**
С тех пор как мир впервые содрогнулся от разрушительной мощи стихийных бедствий — пространственных разломов — прошло уже немало лет. Их возникновение всегда связывали с появлением духов — девушек, обладающих нечеловеческими способностями. Однако откуда у них появились эти силы? Или точнее сказать, от кого девушки их получили?
Выяснилось, что за созданием всех духов стоит некий Фантом, также известный как Дух Начала. Движимая возмездием Токисаки Куруми преисполнилась решимостью убить Духа Начала в прошлом, ещё до того, как он породит всех известных духов. Однако наш главный герой Ицка Шидо не согласен с таким раскладом и намерен не убить, а запечатать силы этого прародителя духов, чтобы разорвать эпорочный круг ненависти.
Пришло время пролить свет на тайну происхождения духов, а также загадочное прошлое Шидо. Пора… начинать свидание!

**Качество видео:** WEBRip (CR)
**Формат:** mkv
**Видео кодек:** x264
**Аудио кодек:** AAC

**Аудио 3:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 196 kbps, 2 ch (Русский, SHIZA Project)
**Аудио 4:** AAC, 44.1 KHz, 128 kbps, 2 ch (Японский, Geek Toys)

03. «Возрождение духа»
04. «Изначальный дух»
05. «Ноль, Мать всего»
06. «Три волшебника»
07. «Листопад Древа мира»
08. «Кто нажал на курок?»
09. «Второе рандеву»

12. ***

**Дополнительная информация:**
DaL возвращается к нам с новым сезоном! Злопыхатели хоронили его с самого первого ,на равне с Сиськобоженькой, думая что для франшизы это будет - "точно последний" сезон. Но каждый раз история выдает настоящего победителя - и вот уже 5 "номерной" сезон DaL увидел свет, приступим к просмотру продолжений приключений любимых с детства героев)

All of my torrents are backed up [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1enFs7NLA3SauP0sqCWeQRLqFpyxG0y36Ph2b9aEY8Mw/edit?usp=sharing). I'm also uploading this series to [bato.to](https://bato.to/series/73510/dead-mount-death-play), mainly so people can read it in ~~Tachiyomi~~ Mihon.

Message me on Discord: **https://discord.gg/xkyVNzR**. 
**This site has no notification system, so if you ask me things in the comments of my torrents, I probably won't see it. Message me on Discord instead.**

description:
**Jujutsu Kaisen Stagione 01**

![https://i.ibb.co/JsSpF91/71-YT0i-Ojw6-L-SL1399.jpg](https://i.ibb.co/JsSpF91/71-YT0i-Ojw6-L-SL1399.jpg)

**.: Scheda del filmato :.**
**Titolo originale:** Jujutsu Kaisen
**Titolo Kanji:** 呪術廻戦
**Anno:** 2020
**Genere:** Azione, Scolastico, Soprannaturale 
**Episodi:** 24

**.: Trama :.**
Itadori Yūji è uno studente all'apparenza normale, che di normale non ha nulla, che frequenta il Club dell'Occulto. I suoi compagni si troveranno nei guai dopo aver trovato il dito mummificato di Ryomen Sukuna, la più feroce divinità demoniaca, e per salvarli così da diventare più forte sarà costretto a ingoiarlo. Yūji diventa tutt'uno con il demone e sotto la guida del più potente degli stregoni, Satoru Gojō, entra nell'Istituto di Arti Occulte di Tokyo, un'organizzazione che combatte le Maledizioni; il suo destino è già scritto: dovrà cercare tutte le 20 dita di Sukuna, ingerirle per poi essere ucciso, così da porre fine una volta per tutte alla minaccia che alberga dentro di lui.

title: ミモザの告白～完全版オーディオブック (The Mimosa Confessions, Vol. 1 - Unabridged Japanese Audiobook)
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/uvGozX4.png "ミモザの告白")

その告白が、世界を変える。

とある地方都市に暮らす冴えない高校生・紙木咲馬には、完璧な幼馴染がいた。
槻ノ木汐――咲馬の幼馴染である彼は、イケメンよりも美少年という表現がしっくり来るほど魅力的な容姿をしている。そのうえスポーツ万能、かつ成績は常に学年トップクラス。極めつけには人望があり、特に女子からは絶大な人気を誇っている――。

幼馴染で誰よりも仲がよかった二人は、しかし高校に進学してからは疎遠な関係に。過去のトラウマと汐に対する劣等感から、咲馬はすっかり性格をこじらせていた。

そんな咲馬にも、好きな人ができる。
クラスの愛されキャラ・星原夏希。彼女と小説の話で意気投合した咲馬は、熱い恋心に浮かれた。
しかしその日の夜、咲馬は公園で信じられないものを目にする。

それはセーラー服を着て泣きじゃくる、槻ノ木汐だった。

『夏へのトンネル、さよならの出口』『きのうの春で、君を待つ』で大きな感動を呼んだ<時と四季>シリーズのコンビ、【八目迷×くっか】が挑む新境地。とある田舎町の学校を舞台にした、恋と変革の物語。
  
[小学館（ガガガ文庫）](https://shogakukan-comic.jp/book?isbn=9784094530186)から購入できます。

著者: 八目迷
題名: ミモザの告白
再生時間: 10 時間 02 分
ナレーター: 桑田 直樹; ランズベリー・アーサー; 山下 七海; 朝日奈 丸佳; 小針 彩希; 向井 莉生; 小林 大紀; 合田 葵; 長岡 龍歩
シリーズ： ミモザの告白
完全版 オーディオブック

ビットレート: 127 kb/s

---
#### 正式版をサポートしてください
#### Please support the official release
---


A high school LGBT+ story of love and transformation—from the award-winning author of The Tunnel to Summer, the Exit of Goodbyes (which inspired an anime film) and Wait For Me Yesterday in Spring!

Growing up in a dreary suburb, Sakuma has little to brighten his humdrum days aside from his best friend. The bright, talented, and attractive Ushio seems to have everything Sakuma lacks, and his good looks, academics, and athletic prowess make him popular with the girls at school. Past trauma—and an understandable inferiority complex—slowly drive the two apart, and by the time they enter high school, they hardly even speak anymore. Thus, Sakuma finds himself alone.

Against all odds, he eventually gains a friend in Natsuki, the sweetest girl in class. The two hit it off gushing about their favorite novels, and he falls head over heels for her. But that very same night, he stumbles upon an unexpected sight while walking through a familiar park: his old friend Ushio, dressed in a full-blown schoolgirl’s uniform and sobbing uncontrollably.

Author: Mei Hachimoku

title: [MrManager] Goku Midnight Eye (1989) BDRemux (Dual Audio, Special Features)
description:
![Goku Midnight Eye](https://i.imgur.com/42TEBo9.png)

(From [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Goku_Midnight_Eye)):
Goku Midnight Eye (MIDNIGHT EYE ゴクウ) is a manga series by Buichi Terasawa about a detective named Goku Furinji (風林寺 悟空) who gains a cybernetic eye implant that can control any computer system on the planet.

![Goku Midnight Eye](https://i.imgur.com/NLaRLvs.png)

This is a remux of the US Blu-ray by Discotek. This Blu-Ray contains the restored HD version of the OVA, the original Japanese audio, along with both the Urban Video US English Dub, and the Manga Entertainment UK English dub. Also included are Discotek's brand new subtitles. A couple of short special features are included as well.

![Goku Midnight Eye](https://i.imgur.com/cRK4dqX.png)

Given this is a remux, no extra encoding was performed to preserve the disc's quality. The video is the original H.264 encoded present on the original disc, and is a 4:3 1080p picture pillarboxed to 16:9. The English dubs and the subtitles are taken directly from the disc.

![Goku Midnight Eye](https://i.imgur.com/fuKChMB.png)

title: [SubsPlus+] Jellyfish Can't Swim in the Night - S01E11 (WEB 1080p AMZN) | Yoru no Kurage wa Oyogenai
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.* 
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

|           | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Okay-Subs**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic OP/ED song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- OP & ED detection using animethemes api
